meta.tagline: Serving people with dignity, care and accountability.
meta.description: Abbasia Welfare Trust is a Rawalpindi-based non-profit supporting poverty alleviation, healthcare, education, skill development and humanitarian relief.

hero.title: Helping families move from hardship to hope.
hero.text: Abbasia Welfare Trust supports underserved families through food assistance, medical help, education support, skill development and timely relief programs.
hero.alt: Abbasia Welfare Trust community meeting in Rawalpindi

who.title: A grassroots charity built around dignity and practical support.
who.text: Abbasia Welfare Trust, also referenced as Abbasia Welfare Trust, is a non-profit organization located near Shamsabad in Rawalpindi. The trust works closely with local communities to identify genuine needs and deliver responsible welfare support.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: To reduce hardship for vulnerable families by connecting donors, volunteers and community workers with meaningful welfare programs.

vision.title: Vision
vision.text: A society where every family has access to food, basic healthcare, learning opportunities and the confidence to rebuild.

ceo.title: A note from our Chairman
ceo.name: Imran Zafar
ceo.text: Our work begins with listening. Every ration bag, medical contribution, school support and relief campaign is a promise that people in difficulty will not be left alone. We welcome donors and volunteers who want their support to reach families with respect and accountability.
ceo.alt: Chairman Imran Zafar of Abbasia Welfare Trust

cta.title: Your donation can become food, medicine, learning and relief.
cta.text: Support verified community needs through a local team working directly with families in Rawalpindi.

projects.title: Food Distribution
projects.description: Monthly ration support and cooked meal distributions for families facing income pressure and food insecurity.

projects.title: Medical Assistance
projects.description: Support for medicines, treatment needs, basic medical equipment and urgent health-related family expenses.
projects.alt: Medical assistance campaign poster by Al Abbasia Welfare Trust

projects.title: Emergency Relief
projects.description: Rapid assistance for families affected by sudden hardship, crisis, illness or local emergency situations.
projects.alt: Prepared meal plates for a welfare campaign

projects.title: Ramadan Campaign
projects.description: Sehri and iftar support for deserving families, daily wage workers and community members during Ramadan.
projects.alt: Ramadan iftar campaign poster for AWT

projects.title: Flood Relief Program
projects.description: Providing emergency flood relief, clean water, dry food and shelter support for families affected by flood damage.
projects.alt: Flood relief support for affected families by Abbasia Welfare Trust

testimonials.quote: AWT works close to the people. Their volunteers understand local needs and deliver help with respect.
testimonials.name: Community Donor

testimonials.quote: The best thing is the practical approach: food, medicine and support that reaches families when it matters.
testimonials.name: Volunteer Member

about.intro: Abbasia Welfare Trust, also referenced as Abbasia Welfare Trust, is a local non-profit organization based at Office No. 1, First Floor, Zaman Plaza, Double Road near Shamsabad in Rawalpindi, Pakistan.
about.history: The trust was formed to respond to practical community needs: poverty, healthcare costs, food insecurity and the lack of sustainable support for marginalized families. Its work is rooted in local relationships and direct community access.
objectives: Provide food and emergency relief to deserving families.
Support medical needs for people unable to afford treatment.
Encourage education and skill-building for long-term independence.
Build a transparent bridge between donors and verified community needs.

timeline.title: Local welfare work begins
timeline.text: AWT starts serving families through community-led support and donor-backed assistance.

timeline.title: Food and healthcare programs grow
timeline.text: The trust strengthens food distribution, medical assistance and relief coordination.

timeline.title: Sustainable support focus
timeline.text: Programs now include education, skill development, Ramadan support and seasonal campaigns.

achievements: Recognized by local communities as a reliable point of assistance.
Delivered Ramadan and food support campaigns with field volunteers.
Raised awareness through community media coverage.
Built a volunteer-friendly structure for ongoing welfare work.

donate.title: Give with confidence. Help with dignity.
donate.intro: Your donation helps AWT provide food, medical support, education assistance, emergency relief and skill development opportunities.
why: Local team with direct community access.
Programs designed around dignity, not dependency.
Every contribution can create immediate practical relief.

methods.name: Bank Transfer
methods.details: Account details can be confirmed by calling the official AWT number before sending funds.

methods.name: JazzCash
methods.details: Call +92 300 5293396 to confirm current JazzCash donation instructions.

methods.name: EasyPaisa
methods.details: Call +92 300 5293396 to confirm current EasyPaisa donation instructions.

faq.question: Can I donate for a specific project?
faq.answer: Yes. You can mention food, medical assistance, education, Ramadan, winter support or emergency relief when contacting the trust.

faq.question: How do I verify donation details?
faq.answer: Please call the official number before transferring funds to confirm the latest payment instructions.

faq.question: Can I support as a volunteer instead of donating money?
faq.answer: Yes. AWT welcomes responsible volunteers for field support, coordination, communication and campaign assistance.

volunteer.title: Volunteer with purpose.
volunteer.intro: AWT welcomes people who can offer time, skills and sincerity. Volunteers help with field work, documentation, donor coordination, campaign support and community outreach.
volunteer.skills: Field support, content writing, photography, logistics, teaching, healthcare support, fundraising, administration
